subject: [PATCH v6 10/10] selftests/dax: add dax/kmem hotplug sysfs regression test

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch adds a selftest to verify the functionality of dax/kmem hotplug sysfs attributes. The test checks that transitioning a kmem-backed dax device between 'unplugged', 'online' and 'online_movable' states works as expected, including idempotence and correct memory management. It also includes a destructive test to ensure force-unbinding does not deadlock. The test discovers an existing kmem-bound dax device or skips if none are available. The patch covers specific regression testing for the online -> unplug -> online_movable -> unplug sequence.
